overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring an abandoned industrial zone with concrete drainage channels, derelict vehicles, and overhead pipelines. The player character walks steadily through narrow alleys and open concrete channels during golden hour lighting with strong directional shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial alley with derelict vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow debris-filled alley between concrete industrial walls, passing abandoned cars and trash piles

entered.detail: derelict blue sedan with open doors and missing wheels
rusted green vehicle partially covered in debris
large concrete bridge structure spanning the alley ahead
scattered piles of blue and green garbage bags against the wall
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial alley littered with abandoned vehicles and trash. The player walks forward past a blue derelict car toward a concrete overpass, with graffiti-covered walls on the left and scattered debris underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with metal grates

events.description: entering a darker covered area beneath concrete structures, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow
exiting the covered section back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across metal grate flooring through a dimly lit concrete corridor, passing industrial pipes and ventilation systems

entered.detail: large metal drainage grates covering the ground surface
smooth concrete walls forming a narrow passage
large cylindrical industrial ventilation ducts mounted on walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered industrial walkway with metal grate flooring, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. The corridor features concrete walls and overhead ventilation pipes before opening back into the light at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: proceeding down a long concrete corridor with puddles reflecting the sky, passing beneath multiple overhead bridges

entered.detail: elevated concrete pedestrian bridge connecting industrial buildings
thick black electrical cables strung between concrete pillars
massive support columns lining the corridor sides

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow industrial corridor with massive concrete pillars and overhead walkways. The ground is wet with reflective puddles, and utility cables stretch across the passage as the player moves toward a distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete drainage channel with industrial pipelines

events.description: turning right into a wide open concrete channel, changing direction from forward to rightward
transitioning from narrow enclosed corridor to wide open industrial drainage channel

agents.ego_description: turning right into a wide concrete drainage channel and continuing forward beneath massive overhead pipes

entered.detail: massive industrial pipelines spanning the width of the channel overhead
sloped concrete walls forming a drainage channel
large cylindrical storage tanks with metal railings
tall electrical pylons with multiple crossbars visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a vast open concrete drainage channel, revealing a wide industrial landscape with massive overhead pipelines, sloped concrete walls, and distant power transmission towers against a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cluttered industrial alleyway into a vast, open concrete drainage basin. It begins by moving past abandoned vehicles and graffiti-covered walls toward a concrete overpass, before transitioning from the bright sunlight into the deep shadows of a covered walkway with metal grate flooring and overhead pipes. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor defined by massive concrete pillars and reflective puddles on the ground. The movement finally turns right, breaking out of the confined passage to reveal a wide industrial landscape dominated by sloped concrete walls, overhead pipelines, and distant power towers under a clear blue sky.
